title: MediTrack
description: A cross-platform health maintenance medication tracking system built for the Hack4Mapandan initiative. Features a Next.js web dashboard and Flutter mobile app connected to Firebase, with push notification reminders, user profile management with avatar upload, and real-time data synchronization across platforms.
features: Doctor & patient dashboards with role-based access
Medication schedule management and adherence tracking
Push notification reminders via Firebase Cloud Messaging
User profile management with avatar upload
Real-time data sync between web and Flutter mobile app
Flutter Android APK for offline-capable mobile access

title: Hack4Mapandan — Health Track
description: Community-driven hackathon project addressing health needs in Mapandan. Conducted field interviews and audio transcription with local residents, produced research documentation, and built a PowerPoint pitch deck covering the Maintenance Medication Tracking solution concept.

title: Portfolio & Activity Log
description: A high-performance, SEO-optimized internship portfolio built with the Next.js App Router and TypeScript. Features data-driven content via local JSON and Markdown files, a filterable work gallery, static route generation for weekly logs, and Lighthouse 90+ optimization targets.

title: OrangeHRM Schema Research
description: Researched OrangeHRM Open Source Edition and produced a database schema map for Employee Records and Timekeeping modules, documenting how attendance data links to employee IDs and feeds into payroll computation workflows.

title: Backlink & Sentiment Analysis
description: Group exploration of Backlink Analysis and Sentiment Distribution, learning how backlinks are discovered and how online mentions reflect overall brand sentiment. Produced a group report on findings.
